mnemonics.title: Compilation Stages
mnemonics.content: PCAL: Preprocess, Compile, Assemble, Link (Like 'PC All Loaded')

acronyms.usage: Software suite containing code editor, compiler, debugger

visualTips.visualization: Imagine factory assembly line with 4 stations: Preprocessor (stamping), Compiler (shaping), Assembler (polishing), Linker (packaging)

analogies.analogy: Like recipe books - contain instructions (function prototypes) but not the actual cooking (definitions)
